overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character exploring a stone village in a mountainous region at night. The character ascends stairs, surveys a valley from a balcony with an NPC companion, then proceeds through the village and onto a mountain trail.

leafless trees silhouetted against the dark sky

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a steep stone staircase flanked by retaining walls in a mountainous rural area at night. A stone farmhouse sits at the top of the stairs, with dead trees visible on the hillside.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow passage between stone buildings leading to upper level

stone bench against the farmhouse wall

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a narrow stone passage between buildings, passing a stone bench before ascending darker interior stairs toward an opening.

scene_state.functional_zone: hillside balcony overlooking industrial valley ruins

events.description: emerges onto open balcony with panoramic valley view
stops walking to stand beside NPC and observe the valley below

agents.ego_description: standing on balcony overlooking valley industrial ruins alongside an NPC companion

segments.scene_description: The character emerges onto a balcony overlooking a vast valley containing industrial ruins and factory chimneys. An NPC stands at the railing observing the view, and the character stops to survey the landscape before moving on.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned village square with stone houses

events.description: descends from balcony into village streets below

segments.scene_description: The character leaves the balcony and descends into an abandoned village square surrounded by stone houses. The character walks past a wooden cart and stone well in the open dirt area.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky mountain trail ascending from village

events.description: exits village through wooden gate onto rocky mountain trail

agents.ego_description: climbing stone steps through rocky terrain leaving the village behind

entered.detail: simple wooden gate marking village exit
narrow trail winding through rocky outcrops
small stone structure or shrine at the top of the path

segments.scene_description: The character exits the village through a wooden gate and begins ascending a rocky mountain trail with stone steps. The path winds through boulders and vegetation toward a small stone structure visible higher up the slope.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that ascends from a rural stone village into the rugged heights of a mountainous landscape at night. It begins with the character climbing a steep stone staircase toward a farmhouse on a hillside dotted with dead trees, before moving through a narrow passage and up dark interior stairs. As the character emerges onto a balcony, the view opens up to reveal a vast valley filled with industrial ruins and factory chimneys where an NPC stands waiting. The scene then shifts as the character descends into an abandoned village square, passing a wooden cart and a stone well in the open dirt. Finally, the camera follows the character through a wooden gate and up a winding rocky trail, passing boulders and vegetation toward a distant stone structure higher on the slope.
